BusinessPress Release

T‑Mobile Brings America’s Best Network to the USGA

BELLEVUE, Wash. & LIBERTY CORNER, N.J. — May 28, 2026 — Golf’s greatest moments deserve the best mobile network — and now they have it. T‑Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) and the United States Golf Association (USGA) today announced a multi-year partnership, making T‑Mobile the Official 5G Network Partner of the U.S. Women’s Open, U.S. Open and additional USGA championships. Through […]
